'''鈭歡-n-h-n''' ('''kaganhenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyanize|cyanize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-n-h-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyanize|cyanize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-n-h-n
|-
! Lemma
| kaganhenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiganhenoko|thiganhenoko]] || [[word:jiganhenoko|jiganhenoko]] || [[word:shiganhenoko|shiganhenoko]] || [[word:kiganhenoko|kiganhenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuganhenoko|thuthuganhenoko]] || [[word:jujuganhenoko|jujuganhenoko]] || [[word:shushuganhenoko|shushuganhenoko]] || [[word:kukuganhenoko|kukuganhenoko]]

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
